sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53014" key="kamptrofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμπτρο-φόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n53014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capsarius</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
